content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials exist but notes.txt just says "n/a" instead of explaining how to reach the subscription paywall / core features (`fastlane/metadata/review_information/notes.txt`).
Pierre: Apple reviewers need explicit steps to reach gated functionality, especially when a paywall blocks core features like app blocking and schedules (App/PaywallView.swift:8). Having valid-looking credentials but a placeholder "n/a" note risks the reviewer getting stuck or rejecting for insufficient information under 2.1. Please replace notes.txt with concrete steps (e.g., "Sign in with provided credentials, then tap Subscribe on the paywall — sandbox purchases are pre-approved / use promo code X").
